mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbound_order ( order_no, customer_id, customer_name_snapshot, total_amount, order_status, remark ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{customerId}, #{customerNameSnapshot}, #{totalAmount}, #{orderStatus}, #{remark} )
mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.customer_id, COALESCE(o.customer_name_snapshot, c.customer_name) AS customerName, o.total_amount, o.order_status, o.remark, o.created_time FROM outbound_order o LEFT JOIN customer c ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE o.id = #{id}
SELECT id, order_no, customer_id, customer_name_snapshot, total_amount, order_status, remark, created_time, updated_time FROM outbound_order WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM outbound_order WHERE customer_id IS NULL AND customer_name_snapshot = #{customerName}
